title: eto.memo.coordination_log.v1
description: Payload schema for an A2A coordination log memo. Validates the `payload` portion of an eto.memo.coordination_log.v1 envelope; envelope shape is defined in docs/memo-schema-registry.md §2.

task_id.description: Stable identifier of the coordinated task.

actor.description: Agent emitting the event (DID or address).

parent_event.description: Optional reference to a prior coordination_log event (e.g. tx signature or content digest) that this event responds to.
